title: Supreme Court gives 8 NLUs green signal to assess implementation of RPwD Act
description: The Supreme Court was recently told that most States and Union Territories ahd finally appointed nodal officers to monitor the implementation of the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016 (RPwD Act) [Justice Sunanda Bhandare Foundation v. Union of India]By way of an order passed on April 28, a Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta directed eight National Law Universities (NLUs) to continue with “Project Ability Empowerment”, a Supreme Court-monitored initiative launched in Septe
